PHA Donor Prospect Explorer

⇩ Click to download results

Column Definitions

ColumnDefinition

Methodology & Data Sources

Data Sources & Scope
Cross-referencing Charlottesville & Albemarle County property owners (assessed value ≥$750,000) against FEC Schedule A individual contribution records from the 2023–2024 and 2025–2026 election cycles. Property data from Albemarle County GIS and City of Charlottesville Open Data. 330,639 FEC records → 15,572 unique donors → 2,811 matched property owners.
Matching & Deduplication
Donors matched to property owners by exact last name + first name. Matched prospects sharing a normalized mailing address are consolidated into one row.
Affinity Scoring
Affinity Score (0–100): Share of giving to progressive-aligned causes, weighted by proximity to PHA’s mission (Progressive ×1.5, VA Dem ×1.3, Natl Dem ×1.1), normalized against a theoretical maximum.
Category Notes
Environment ($): Subset of contributions to environmental, clean energy, and conservation PACs, matched by donor name. Environment ($) contributions are also included within Progressive ($) totals. • Progressive ($): Social justice, equity, environmental, civil rights PACs • Conservative: Pro-life, gun rights, MAGA-aligned PACs • VA Dem / VA Rep: Virginia candidates and state party committees • Natl Dem / Natl Rep: National candidates, party committees, platforms • Other: Industry PACs, bipartisan, unclassified
